utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items with a description and a cost for each. Each item requires the specific type of coverage and costs. The plan specifies the coverage type/description and provides a cost for all items, and the total_budget includes a total monthly cost. Therefore, all items are present and specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific policies by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage with Technology Protection and Home Office Protection add-ons (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). I matched each to the ground-truth ratings under their respective categories. LifeFirst Standard Plan appears in primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 9. PrimeHome Premium Coverage appears in property_protection.home_content with rating 3. Technology Protection and Home Office Protection are listed under property_enhancement_services with ratings 8 and 7 respectively; although the final plan bundles them as add-ons, they should still be mapped individually. PrimeTravel Premium Plan appears in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 3.
